renderer.description: The type of renderer to use for the scatter plot. - svg-single: Renders every scatter item in its own element. - svg-batch: Renders all scatter items in a single batched SVG path. - webgl: Renders scatter items using WebGL for better performance, at the cost of some limitations.

onItemClick.description: Callback fired when a marker is clicked directly. For closest-point clicks (the ScatterChart default), pass onItemClick to the chart container instead.

event.name: event
event.description: Mouse event recorded on the element.

slotProps.description: The props used for each component slot.

slotDescriptions.marker: The component that renders the marker for a scatter point.
